message:
fix: correct stale comment in down.go Phase 6 about tmux socket isolation (gt-qzjb)

The comment claimed per-town tmux sockets isolate nuke to one town
server. In reality, all towns share the default socket, so --nuke
kills the shared server affecting all towns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: gastown/refinery
Rig: gastown
Role: refinery
